expectations.text: Case focus is explicitly covered: modern grid hyperlink-style coverage separates contextual-link styling from ordinary element rendering
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly restates the case focus and provides multiple scenarios separating linked vs non-linked styling, e.g., “Non-linked attribute cells do not look like hyperlinks (separation from ordinary rendering)” and “Mixed-content row: only linked objects get hyperlink styling (no “row-level” styling bleed)”.

expectations.text: Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md declares “Primary phase under test - phase4a” and the content is subcategory-only scenarios with atomic steps and verification leaves; it also includes a “Contract check (phase4a)” confirming “Subcategory-first: Yes”. execution_notes.md likewise states the deliverable is “phase4a-aligned subcategory coverage”.
